Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.dataframe

Class DataFrameWriteOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.dataframe.DataFrameWriteOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
DataFrameWriteOptions
public static final class DataFrameWriteOptions.Builder extends Object
Builder for DataFrameWriteOptions.

  • Method Details

    • singleFileOutput

      public DataFrameWriteOptions.Builder singleFileOutput(boolean singleFileOutput)
      Set whether to write a single file. When true, an output file is always created even if the DataFrame is empty. Default: true.
      Parameters:
      singleFileOutput - true to write a single file
      Returns:
      this builder

    • insertOp

      public DataFrameWriteOptions.Builder insertOp(InsertOp insertOp)
      Set the insert operation mode. Default: InsertOp.APPEND.
      Parameters:
      insertOp - the insert operation mode
      Returns:
      this builder

    • partitionBy

      public DataFrameWriteOptions.Builder partitionBy(List<String> partitionBy)
      Set columns to partition by. Default: empty (no partitioning).
      Parameters:
      partitionBy - the column names to partition by
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public DataFrameWriteOptions build()
      Builds the DataFrameWriteOptions.
      Returns:
      the built options
